codeReview.evidence: Prior blockers for malformed --limit and invalid --batch-date were fixed and reverified.

manualQa.evidence: CLI happy path, missing LLM config edge, malformed CLI input edges, quality log, and cleanup log were verified from artifacts.

adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: CLI rejects with a positive integer error before report generation.
CLI rejects with a valid calendar date error before report generation.

artifactRefs.description: Generated deterministic mock LLM daily report.
Typecheck, tests, and production build transcript.
No daily-arxiv compose services or 3211/6379 listeners remain.

gateReview.evidence: Final gate reviewer returned APPROVE after cleanup and boundary fixes.

iteration.evidence: Focused CLI tests, typecheck, full test suite, and Next production build passed after the boundary fix.

criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: User wanted the daily-arxiv project completed with parallel agents so it can fetch latest arXiv papers daily and use an LLM for reading summaries.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: Restored app plus a local CLI surface that proves latest-paper ingestion and LLM-style summary generation without requiring live DB/API keys.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: The restored app retains existing web/API/worker/report/reading flows, and the new daily:summary command proves the core arXiv-to-summary loop through CLI artifacts.
